description: Learned site layout patterns — updated when recipes are pushed from the Parish Trainer extension. No AI keys required.

pdf_link_list+click_then_pdf.label: News page with PDF links
pdf_link_list+click_then_pdf.advice: Click Find bulletin → Pick newest, or Follow a link to the latest PDF.

wp_pdfemb_list+click_then_pdf.label: WordPress PDF embed list
wp_pdfemb_list+click_then_pdf.advice: Click the top/newest date card, then Get a PDF.

wix_html+html_capture.label: Wix HTML bulletin
wix_html+html_capture.advice: Open bulletin page → Save page as PDF. Sunday harvest predicts the dated URL (e.g. 14_june_2026) automatically.

html_click_chain+click_chain.label: Menu then redirect PDF
html_click_chain+click_chain.advice: Follow links through the menu (e.g. Newsletter), then Get a PDF on the final page.

parish_messenger_embed+click_then_pdf.label: Parish Services / Parish Messenger widget
parish_messenger_embed+click_then_pdf.advice: Open parish news page → wait for widget → click View Newsletter (newest dated row). Ignore Gift Aid / Data Entry admin PDFs in the menu.

direct_pdf+click_then_pdf.label: direct_pdf
direct_pdf+click_then_pdf.advice: You are already on the PDF — click Get a PDF.

image_bulletin+html_capture.label: image_bulletin
image_bulletin+html_capture.advice: Click Get an image or Pick an image on this page.
